summary: Tested Auto-Update Calendar V1 feature. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified: login error message, synced state (green Check), out_of_sync state (amber AlertTriangle), re-sync functionality, and Integrations page auto-sync section.
passed_tests: 1. PATCH with title (calendar field) triggers auto-update - returns 200 immediately (PASSED)
2. PATCH with description (calendar field) triggers auto-update (PASSED)
3. PATCH with duration_minutes (calendar field) triggers auto-update (PASSED)
4. PATCH with location (calendar field) triggers auto-update (PASSED)
5. PATCH with penalty_amount (non-calendar field) does NOT trigger auto-update (PASSED)
6. PATCH with cancellation_deadline_hours (non-calendar field) does NOT trigger auto-update (PASSED)
7. PATCH with tolerated_delay_minutes (non-calendar field) does NOT trigger auto-update (PASSED)
8. GET /api/calendar/sync/status/{id} returns synced state correctly (PASSED)
9. GET /api/calendar/sync/status/{id} returns external_event_id (PASSED)
10. GET /api/calendar/sync/status/{id} returns sync_source field (PASSED)
11. Manual sync on already synced returns already_synced (idempotent) (PASSED)
12. Auto-update does not block save - response time < 5s (PASSED)
13. Login with wrong password returns 401 with error detail (PASSED)
14. Login with non-existent user returns 401 (PASSED)
15. Login with correct credentials returns access_token (PASSED)
16. GET /api/calendar/connections returns connected providers (PASSED)
17. GET /api/calendar/auto-sync/settings returns current settings (PASSED)
18. PUT /api/calendar/auto-sync/settings validates input (PASSED)
19. Manual sync endpoint exists and works (PASSED)
20. Unsync endpoint exists (PASSED)
21. UI: Login error message visible with red styling (PASSED)
22. UI: Appointment detail - synced state shows green Check button (PASSED)
23. UI: Appointment detail - out_of_sync state shows amber AlertTriangle button (PASSED)
24. UI: Appointment detail - out_of_sync button title shows error reason (PASSED)
25. UI: Re-sync from out_of_sync state works (UPDATE not CREATE) (PASSED)
26. UI: Integrations page - Auto-sync section visible with provider selector (PASSED)
27. UI: Integrations page - Google and Outlook connections visible (PASSED)
seed_data_creation: Appointment f11d54c8-af9b-4df8-ad2e-cc831aa3ae25 was used for testing. Title was modified during tests. Sync status was manipulated to test out_of_sync UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-update calendar feature fully tested. CALENDAR_FIELDS constant includes: title, start_datetime, duration_minutes, location, meeting_provider, description. Non-calendar fields (penalty_amount, cancellation_deadline_hours, tolerated_delay_minutes) do NOT trigger auto-update. Sync status endpoint returns out_of_sync=true with sync_error_reason when applicable. Manual sync on out_of_sync events does UPDATE (not CREATE). Login error message now visible with data-testid='login-error-message'. 401 interceptor fixed to exclude auth routes.

verified_features.no_update_on_non_calendar_fields: PATCH with penalty_amount/cancellation_deadline_hours does NOT trigger auto-update
verified_features.sync_status_out_of_sync: Returns out_of_sync=true and sync_error_reason when applicable
verified_features.manual_resync_does_update: POST /api/calendar/sync/appointment/{id} on out_of_sync event does UPDATE not CREATE
verified_features.idempotence: Manual sync on already synced returns already_synced
verified_features.non_blocking_save: Auto-update does not block appointment save (response < 5s)
verified_features.login_error_message: Visible with red styling when password incorrect
verified_features.ui_synced_state: Green Check button for synced appointments
verified_features.ui_out_of_sync_state: Amber AlertTriangle button with error reason in title
verified_features.integrations_auto_sync: Provider selector with Google/Outlook options, Désactiver button

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked. Real Outlook calendar events are created/updated via Microsoft Graph API.
